title: Mine Pulse
description: Dig in front and destroy the farthest minerals.
body:
Vein Mining's mining scope can be too large and uncontrollable, that's not what you're looking for, is it? But is it also troublesome to keep digging? Don't want to dig as you go?

Now we have a new solution：all you have to do is stand at a point, dig where you want to dig and you will destroy the farthest minerals in this vein and fly straight to you!

And now we also support tree cutting, you can dig from the highest place, you no longer have to worry about the tree being too high, that make you have to stand on the top to start cutting the tree!

Want to add some extra support? Modify it in Config!

|Mining Tree|Mining Ore|
|:---:|:---:|
|![Mining Tree](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmarokIce/MinePulse/refs/heads/master/img/Tree.gif)|![Mining Ore](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AmarokIce/MinePulse/refs/heads/master/img/Ore.gif)|
